title: crepis biennis
intro: Crepis biennis, also known as rosinweed or bitter weed, is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Crepis biennis include its ability to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. Crepis biennis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
